docs.title: Built For the CSR2 Enthusiast
docs.text:
Welcome to the official Kustomz Mod Shop website.

Kustomz Mod Shop provides premium mod services for CSR2 through a professional, organized, and customer-focused experience.

This website is the official source for information about our services, customer portal, bot, and legal policies.

docs.title: 🏎️ Mod Services
docs.text:
Kustomz Mod Shop is dedicated to delivering premium mod services for the CSR2 community.

Our commitment is to provide a professional experience built on consistency, organization, and trust.

docs.title: 🎫 Official Customer Portal
docs.text:
Our official Discord server serves as the Kustomz Mod Shop customer portal.

Customers can:

  • Open private service tickets
  • Communicate directly with staff
  • Receive updates regarding active requests
  • Stay informed through announcements and community channels

Join the Official Kustomz Mod Shop Discord Server

docs.title: 🤖 Kustomz Bot
docs.text: The Kustomz Bot helps maintain the customer portal through ticket automation, server management, and community management.

docs.title: ⚖️ Legal
docs.text:
Official documentation including:

  • Disclaimer
  • Terms of Service
  • Privacy Policy
  • Acceptable Use Policy
  • Data Deletion Policy

docs.title: Our Commitment
docs.text:
Every aspect of Kustomz Mod Shop is designed to deliver a professional customer experience.

From our branding and customer portal to our ticket system and policies, our focus remains the same:

Professional. Organized. Premium. Confident. Trustworthy.

docs.title: Acceptable Use
docs.text: No spam, harassment, exploits, or malicious behavior.

docs.title: Data Deletion
docs.text: Users may request deletion of stored data through the support server.

docs.title: Features
docs.text: Describe moderation, automation, integrations, leveling, and custom systems.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Invite the bot, grant permissions, and configure your server.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.text: The bot may store Discord IDs and configuration required for operation. Data is never sold.

docs.title: Support
docs.text: Join the official Kustomz Discord support server.

docs.title: Terms of Service
docs.text: This service is provided as-is. Users must comply with Discord policies and may not abuse the bot.
